description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular form with a light wood grain finish on the sides and a smooth, white top surface. The front panel is framed with the same wood texture and includes a single, centered round knob, suggesting a single large drawer. The back panel is plain, with visible fasteners at the top corners, indicating assembly points. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. The chest sits on small, dark feet that slightly elevate it from the ground, providing stability and a subtle shadow gap. Its construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban interiors such as entryways, garages, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, light wood chest of drawers with a white top and a single front drawer featuring a round knob. Minimalist design with clean lines and subtle feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-framed panel and the absence of visible handles or knobs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain texture and visible fasteners at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain white panel, framed in wood, and a single centered round knob.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with wood grain texture and no fasteners visible.
